title: Pub L'Arbalète
address: Rue de la Tour-Maîtresse 4, 1204 Genève, Switzerland

reviews.text: What a gem! Stopped in for a quick plat du jour... the veal was perfect, the staff were welcoming and attentive. Lovely warm atmosphere in the centre of a sometimes pretentious city - and very reasonably priced in comparison to others. I'll return every time I visit from now on...
reviews.name: Tom Falla

reviews.text: Very nice restaurant tucked away very friendly staff. The food is amazing. I will definitely be coming back reasonable price.
reviews.name: M B69

reviews.text: Stumbled on this spot on a Tuesday evening after learning that most restaurants in the area close their kitchen at 10 pm. Was about 10:15 and the owner agreed to fit in one last order. I had the salmon pasta, which came with a garden salad. Pasta was a simple cream sauce and very generous amounts of smoked salmon. Nice chill music and great atmosphere on the patio. Would not hesitate to come back.
reviews.name: Johnny B

reviews.text: Very nice staff! Good atmosphere! Very nice spot! Liked the tables outside!
reviews.name: Mari Nomikou

reviews.text: Stumbled across this place today, felt like being on the cast of Cheers. All the regulars greeted with a hug, staff so lovely, food and drink excellent and Carmello the wee dog keeping everyone in order! Would recommend

reviewContext.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews.name: Emma Royds

reviews.text: Lovely staff, great daily specials and well-priced.  Perfect spot for a quick weekday lunch.  Emelia on the server staff is the best!
reviews.name: Wes

reviews.text: Thank you. Late back from the England win, I just needed a quiet drink to let the adrenaline out of my system. Perfect.
reviews.name: Natasha Houseman

reviews.text:
We were visiting geneva and were trying to find a place to eat.
L’arbalète was a gem!
The chef is from Portugal and they offer Portuguese dishes as well as typical French ones.
We tried the pulpo, the calamari and the entrecôte (steak).
Everything was cooked perfectly
Came with a salad as an appetizer.
Service was super quick, chef was attentive.
Prices were great (between 22 and 30 Swiss francs).
Recommend!!!
reviews.name: Lo

reviews.text: Really nice and cosy pub in Geneva. One of the few places in the old town where you can find a real Anglo Saxon pub atmosphere with none of the Calvinist snobbery. They also have a small private wine tasting room next door. Good selection of Portuguese wines to boot.
reviews.name: Zoran Lalvani

reviews.text: Absolutely fantastic find, vibrant atmosphere, super food, Then you got the service from all the staff. Outstanding, Will return soon for sure
reviews.name: john bullen

title: Pub Goudale Tourelle
address: Chem. de la Tourelle 2, 1209 Genève, Switzerland
openingHoursBusinessConfirmationText: Confirmed by this business 4 weeks ago

reviews.text: Good place for after work, good choise  for food and beer. I recomand

reviewContext.Parking options: Paid parking lot, Free street parking, Paid parking garage

reviews.name: L R

reviews.textTranslated: Super friendly staff and atmosphere! A great pub to hang out with friends and family!
reviews.text: Super sympa staff and ambiance! Un super pub pour se trouver entre amis et familles!
reviews.name: Mendo Balci

reviews.textTranslated: Beautiful upstairs location with a terrace, impeccable service, excellent value for money
reviews.text: Lieu très beau à l’étage avec terrasse , service impeccable, rapport qualité prix au top
reviews.name: Sylvie

reviews.textTranslated:
What a beautiful place!!!

Comfortable, with music that's not too loud, a lovely view from the terrace, and very attentive, responsive, and customer-focused staff.

A special mention for Léo, the manager of Goudale Petit-Saconnex.
Calm, composed, friendly, and very attentive to the customers of Petit-Saconnex.
I invite all residents and those from the surrounding area to discover this new establishment. ❤️❤️❤️
reviews.text:
Quel bel endroit !!!
Confortable, une musique pas forte, un beau paysage depuis la terrasse et un personnel très attentif, réactif et à l’écoute des clients.
Une mention spéciale pour Léo, le responsable du Goudale Petit-Saconnex.
Calme, posé, sympathique et très attentif à la clientèle du Petit-Saconnex.
Je convie tous les habitants ainsi que des alentours, à découvrir ce nouvel établissement. ❤️❤️❤️
reviews.name: Paprika Aloha

updatesFromCustomers.text: Big Shout to Alex, great to see you.

reviews.text: In Geneva just across the road from the train station. Beer was a good price, the staff were good and it serves good food. It's a sports bar as well so plenty of TV's to watch.
reviews.name: Terry Adamson

reviews.text: The food and beer prices are good. The food quality and quantity is great. The staff is super friendly and they were attentive to see if we need anything else. I paid 67 CHF (no tip, the guys did not even asked, but I gave him cash, again the customer service was GREAT) for two meals and two .5L beers.
reviews.name: Efren Dominguez

reviews.text: Very relaxed ambience. The prices are reasonable and the bartenders are friendly. The beer selection menu is displayed at a convenient location. There are some big tables which might fit around a group of 15+. They have some good selection of spirits. Be sure to ask them if you have something in mind.
reviews.name: SOUMYANANDA GOSWAMI

reviews.text:
I arrived in Geneva after a difficult two weeks and was greeted by the Britannia not 1 minute after walking out the train station.

1L beer, friendly staff who made such an effort to speak English as my French is basic at best, great atmosphere and, without a doubt, one - if not - the best burgers i have ever had. I don't know if it was the beer, my exhaustion or the burger itself but wow wow wow! People were watching me enjoy the heck out of this burger, I couldn't care less. What a way to start my travelling journey through Europe.

5 stars because 8 isn't an option
reviews.name: Andrew Maxwell

reviews.text: Great choice of beers! I tried also the classic fish and chips which was very tasty!
reviews.name: Eric Schulze

reviews.text: In Britannica Pub, there is the best food I have ever eaten in any pub in the world. Try the salmon or the lamb - it blows your mind off - just incredibly good.

reviewContext.Recommended dishes: Classic Fish and Chips, Britainic Beef Sand

reviews.name: Marcel Stoessel

reviews.text:
Last night on vacation in Geneva and wish I’d found this wonderful pub on day one. Great food & draft beer. TVs on Eurocup and Wimbledon but not noisy so conversations were easy.
GREAT bartenders, deserve raises. 🍻

reviewContext.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

reviews.name: Mark Schatzman

reviews.text: My favorite place in Geneva. Whether for a drink after a long working day or a late night snack, always a good choice. Good selection of beers with different monthly offers, decent choice of wines and some pub classics like burgers (my favorite is chedar&bacon), fish&chips or nachos. Very friendly staff, sport events on big screens and live music on weekends are also a big plus.
reviews.name: Hrvoje Debač

reviews.text: Great atmosphere, friendly bar tender. Great prices
reviews.name: J. fortney

reviews.text:
During our stay at Hotel Astoria last November, my wife, young son, and I had the pleasure of visiting Britannia Pub each morning for their continental breakfast. While the breakfast itself was a great perk of the hotel stay—simple, fresh, and well-prepared—the real highlight was the exceptional service from Scott, the barman.

From the very first morning, Scott made us feel right at home. By the second day, he had already memorized our coffee orders and even set up a table with a child’s chair before we arrived—a small but incredibly thoughtful gesture that spoke volumes about his attentiveness. Beyond his excellent service, Scott is a genuinely great guy with an interesting life story, and chatting with him became something we looked forward to each morning.

Geneva is full of excellent cafés and restaurants, but it’s rare to find this level of warmth and hospitality. If I return, it would be just to thank Scott again for making our mornings so enjoyable. Highly recommend stopping by—whether for breakfast, a pint, or simply some great conversation!
reviews.name: William Toscano

title: The Crowned Eagle
openingHoursBusinessConfirmationText: Updated by this business 11 weeks ago

reviews.text: A nice rustic bar with no frills. They have a great beerand wine selection. The barlady was really friendly. We went in there once and when we went back a day or 2 later, she remembered what we were drinking during our previous visit. The food they serve is pizza that they get from a neighbouring business, which is a brilliant way of businesses helping one another. We ordered a pizza and admittedly, it was not the greatest but still good.

reviewContext.Noise level: Loud, but you can still talk

reviews.name: Johan Erasmus

reviews.text: Hello sens they change the waitress this place is more warm and more welcoming atmosphere.thank you Marina for always welcoming us with love and respect.
reviews.name: Thiebault whitepinoy

reviews.text: Lovely place to hang out and grab a drink after work, great staff that is friendly and attentive, possibility to order good Italian food from the adjacent restaurant, a pool table with friendly tournaments on a weekly basis, live music on a regular basis. Great work by the team behind the bar and the kitchen staff!
reviews.name: Karim Mamdouh

reviews.text: Coolest sports bar in Geneva. Pinball, pool and good service. Mark’s the best barman
reviews.name: Patrick Chaves

reviews.text: A beautiful bar with a lively atmosphere and plenty of character. The walls are covered with interesting pictures, adding to the charm.
reviews.name: Ali Alaspli

reviews.text: The Crowned Eagle is a delightful place for beer enthusiasts, particularly those partial to a good pint of Guinness. The ambience is cosy and inviting. Their offering of games, notably a well-maintained snooker table, adds an engaging dimension to the place, making it an excellent choice for both a casual pint and an entertaining evening.
reviews.name: Thunsereibandith NGETH

reviews.text: I'd love the place to relax after a hard day of  work.
reviews.name: Laurentius Wedeniwski

reviews.text:
Go there as often as I can, so consider myself a regular there now. Good live music and love that the restaurant next door delivers pizza at the bar.

The staff if friendly with a lot of banter and a very varied expatriate clientele
reviews.name: Mona Gulbrandsen

reviews.text:
What a mega pub. Son and I visited Geneva for a few days and found this pub. We thought it would be a great place to ask about places to visit and trips out, etc.
Great reception when we walked in, Mark the barman was so welcoming and helpful we soon had plenty of information. The pizza's are definitely some of the best I've eaten. The atmosphere in the bar is great helped along by Mark who has a great rapport with the locals and strangers a like, we visited on several occasions and celebrated St Patrick's day in the Crowned Eagle. (Got back to our hotel at 2am.) No hesitation in recommending this bar I will be going back later in the year.
Make sure you ask if Mark is working.
reviews.name: Jonathan Wisbey

reviews.text: Thank you for the water for my dog! The beer, the vibe, and the music were perfect
reviews.name: Misun Yoon
